hypothesis: Combining ATR-based risk management with unique indicators like Filipino snake filer will create a robust strategy that minimizes losses and maximizes profits.

This strategy uses Bollinger Bands, ATR and RSI to filter out noise and identify trends in the 30-minute FILUSD chart. The inclusion of FilusDC's implied volatility (ATR) adds a layer of risk management by filtering out low-volatility periods. Additionally, the use of RSI as an additional indicator helps confirm trending behavior before entering trades.
